paper_record.title: Quantum Computing and Error Mitigation with Deep Learning for Frenkel Excitons
paper_record.abstract: Quantum computers, currently in the noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) era, have started to provide scientists with a novel tool to explore quantum physics and chemistry. While several electronic systems have been extensively studied, Frenkel excitons, as prototypical optical excitations, remain among the less-explored applications. Here, we first use variational quantum deflation to calculate the eigenstates of the Frenkel Hamiltonian and evaluate the observables based on the oscillator strength for each eigenstate. Furthermore, using NISQ quantum computers requires performing error mitigation techniques alongside simulations. To deal with noisy qubits, we developed a deep-learning-based framework combined with a post-selection technique to learn the noise pattern and mitigate the error. Our mitigation methods work well and outperform the conventional post-selection and remain valid on real hardware.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 本研究利用变分量子通缩算法和深度学习误差抑制技术，在噪声量子硬件上实现了对蒽模型中 Frenkel 激子能级和达维多夫分裂的高精度模拟。
one_sentence_summary.en: This study utilizes variational quantum deflation and deep-learning-based error mitigation to achieve high-precision simulation of Frenkel exciton levels and Davydov splitting in an anthracene model on noisy quantum hardware.

problem.zh: 在噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）时代，如何准确模拟激子系统并有效抑制硬件噪声对物理观测量（如达维多夫分裂）的影响。
problem.en: How to accurately simulate excitonic systems and effectively mitigate hardware noise's impact on physical observables like Davydov splitting in the NISQ era.

approach.zh: 采用变分量子通缩（VQD）算法计算哈密顿量本征态，并开发了一种基于深度学习的前馈神经网络（FNN）框架，结合后选择技术来学习噪声模式并修复波函数。
approach.en: Employing the Variational Quantum Deflation (VQD) algorithm to calculate eigenstates and developing a deep-learning-based feed-forward neural network (FNN) framework combined with post-selection to learn noise patterns and mitigate errors.

main_takeaway.zh: 深度学习误差抑制方法（Post-DL）显著优于传统的后选择技术，能将真实量子硬件上的达维多夫分裂误差降低至 10 cm-1 以内，达到实验可比精度。
main_takeaway.en: The deep-learning error mitigation method (Post-DL) significantly outperforms conventional post-selection, reducing the Davydov splitting error on real quantum hardware to less than 10 cm-1, reaching experimentally comparable precision.

why_it_matters.zh: 该工作扩展了量子计算在有机半导体光学特性模拟中的应用，并证明了机器学习是提升当前非容错量子设备计算准确性的有力工具。
why_it_matters.en: This work extends the application of quantum computing to the simulation of optical properties in organic semiconductors and proves that machine learning is a powerful tool for enhancing the accuracy of current non-fault-tolerant quantum devices.

reason.zh: 成功在真实量子硬件上实现了具有物理意义的激子能级高精度模拟，并提出了一种高效的深度学习误差抑制方案。
reason.en: Successfully achieved high-precision simulation of physically meaningful exciton levels on real hardware and proposed an efficient deep-learning error mitigation scheme.

reason.zh: 论文聚焦于凝聚态物理中的激子模型，且采用了标准的物理研究格式与方法。
reason.en: The paper focuses on exciton models in condensed matter physics and employs standard physical research formats and methodologies.
